URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/creatinine-test/ 
Creatinine Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a creatinine test? 
This test measures creatinine levels in a sample of your blood and/or urine (pee). Creatinine is a normal waste product in your body. It's made when you use your muscles and some of the muscle tissue breaks down.
Normally, your kidneys filter creatinine from your blood and remove it from your body in your urine. If there is a problem with your kidneys, creatinin
